creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Created attachment 217464
Patch that deprecates audio/ripit

The attached port adds DEPRECATED to the ports Makefile and I set EXPIRATION_DATE to 2020-11-01. This is the first time I am deprecating a port I am maintaining and therefore I am not sure, if I am expected to submit a patch removing the port in November, or if that happens automatically.
